h1.title: God in His Creation
h1.author: Witness Lee
h1.lyrics: God the Lord is the Creator, / He has made the heavens and earth; / All the things in all the universe / To His glory give their birth.

h422.title: The Divine Light
h422.author: Witness Lee
h422.lyrics: Walk in the light, the Lord is in the light, / Shine on me, shine on me; / Darkness is gone, the day is breaking bright, / Shine on me, shine on me.

h11.title: Eating the Tree of Life
h11.author: Witness Lee
h11.lyrics: He’s the tree of life, / We can eat of Him! / He's the spring of life, / We can drink of Him!

h73.title: The Vessel of Honor
h73.author: Witness Lee
h73.lyrics: I am a vessel, / God is my content; / For His own glory / I am truly meant.
